prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: light cultivation desktop background
Primary request: a serene Chinese xianxia cultivation terrace at first light, pale jade stone, thin morning mist, distant layered mountains and cloud sea, a modest incense table and bamboo screen on the far right, quiet sense of beginning spiritual practice
Style/medium: cinematic realistic fantasy environment concept art, physically credible architecture and atmosphere, refined material detail
Composition/framing: ultrawide desktop background, left 58 percent is calm low-detail pale mist and soft mountain silhouettes for readable app content, all architectural focal detail on the right
Lighting/mood: bright soft dawn, pearl white sky, pale celadon, cool gray and restrained warm sunlight, luminous but never washed out
Constraints: environment only; no people; no UI; no frames; no panels; no icons; no letters; no Chinese characters; no calligraphy; no numbers; no signs; no logo; no watermark

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: persistent female cultivation-attendant identity anchor for a desktop side panel
Primary request: one adult Chinese xianxia female attendant, calm intelligent expression, distinctive natural face, dark hair in a restrained half-up style, wearing a simple celadon and ivory outer-disciple robe with practical layered fabric and no ornate rank symbols
Style/medium: cinematic realistic fantasy character portrait, refined natural skin and fabric texture, premium game-character key art without looking like a game screenshot
Composition/framing: vertical portrait, three-quarter body visible from head to below knees, centered neutral standing pose, hands relaxed and visible, direct three-quarter gaze, generous margin around hair and sleeves; this exact face, hair, body proportions, age, pose and camera must serve as the immutable identity anchor for all later outfit edits
Scene/backdrop: quiet desaturated jade-gray mist with a subtle stone floor, deliberately low detail and evenly lit so the portrait blends into both light and dark translucent UI panels
Lighting/mood: soft neutral key light, restrained jade rim light, serene and dependable
Constraints: exactly one person; adult; no nameplate; no text; no calligraphy; no UI; no frame; no logo; no watermark; no weapon; no pet; no revealing clothing; no exaggerated anatomy
